name: Enterprise IT & Telecommunications (DACH)
description: Technology, IT services, and telecommunications enterprises with 500-30,000 employees and EUR 200M-20B revenue in DACH.

tam.description: European cloud services in tech and telecom
tam.source: ISG 2025 — technology and telecom companies are aggressive cloud adopters, with approx. EUR 18B European spend on multi-cloud management, container platforms, and FinOps tooling

sam.description: DACH tech and telecom enterprise cloud services
sam.source: DACH has ~200 qualifying tech/telecom enterprises; estimated EUR 3.2B addressable for managed multi-cloud, FinOps, and container platform services based on ~18% DACH share of European tech sector IT spend

som.description: 25 customers x EUR 1.8M ACV in 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up: ~200 qualifying enterprises; Deutsche Telekom ecosystem gives warm access to ~50; target 50% conversion = 25 customers; blended ACV EUR 1.8M (multi-cloud governance EUR 800K/yr + FinOps + container platform EUR 1M) = EUR 45M
